summary: Added aggregation-only SELF_MODEL.json generation. build_self_model_index now aggregates CAP, GAP, VERIFY, and audit records without synthesizing recommendations. scripts/build_self_model.py writes docs/self_model/SELF_MODEL.json. The generated index reports active capabilities, open gaps, verification records, known risks with source pointers, recommendations copied only from GAP recommended_first_slice fields, and audit summary counts. Focused self-model tests passed with 14 tests and the full suite passed with 283 tests before commit.
